entries.source: Yes. Schools can use the public product first, then discuss custom AI learning spaces with school-specific workflows, confidentiality, and funded access options.
entries.value: Si. Os centros poden usar primeiro o produto público e logo falar de espazos personalizados de aprendizaxe con IA con fluxos específicos do centro, confidencialidade e opcións de acceso financiado.

entries.source: Yes. Subject hubs are public pages built for learners, Google, and AI answer engines. They expose only public learning guidance and public guest-mode URLs, not private saved chats.
entries.value: Si. Os centros temáticos son páxinas públicas construídas para estudantes, Google e motores de respostas con IA. Expoñen só orientación pública de aprendizaxe e URL públicos de modos de convidado, non chats privados gardados.

entries.source: Yes. Teachers and school leaders can use the public prompt library to evaluate learning behaviors before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Si. Docentes e líderes escolares poden usar a biblioteca pública de prompts para avaliar comportamentos de aprendizaxe antes de falar dunha implantación escolar adaptada.

entries.source: Yes. The guide library links into public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, quizzes, flashcards, and historical conversations.
entries.value: Si. A biblioteca de guías enlaza con modos públicos de convidado como Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, Math Step Coach, cuestionarios, tarxetas e conversas históricas.

entries.source: Yes. The historical person mode is a learning simulation for perspective and questioning. It should not be cited as an authenticated quotation.
entries.value: Si. O modo de persoa histórica é unha simulación de aprendizaxe para a perspectiva e as preguntas. Non debe citarse como unha cita autenticada.

entries.source: Yes. The linked public learning modes open in guest mode, so learners can try explanations, Socratic questions, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, and more without starting from a marketing page.
entries.value: Si. Os modos públicos de aprendizaxe enlazados ábrense en modo convidado, así que os estudantes poden probar explicacións, preguntas socráticas, acompañamento de deberes, cuestionarios, tarxetas e máis sen comezar desde unha páxina de márketing.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest learning modes are designed for free access, so learners can start without needing a school deployment or paid account.
entries.value: Si. Os modos públicos de aprendizaxe como convidado están deseñados para acceso gratuíto, para que estudantes poidan comezar sen precisar un despregamento escolar nin unha conta de pago.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes and audience pages are designed so parents can inspect the learning behavior before relying on it.
entries.value: Si. Os modos públicos de convidado e as páxinas de público están deseñados para que os pais poidan inspeccionar o comportamento de aprendizaxe antes de confiar nel.

entries.source: Yes. The public guest modes let school leaders and teachers try the learning experience before discussing a tailored school deployment.
entries.value: Si. Os modos públicos de convidado permiten que líderes escolares e docentes proben a experiencia de aprendizaxe antes de falar dunha implantación escolar adaptada.

entries.source: Yes. The public Homework Coach is available at /chat/homework-coach, and this subject hub links to the supporting modes and guides.
entries.value: Si. O Homework Coach público está dispoñible en /chat/homework-coach, e este centro temático enlaza cos modos e guías de apoio.

entries.source: Yes. The recommended use is hints, explanations, step checks, feedback, and review prompts rather than final answers you cannot explain.
entries.value: Si. O uso recomendado son pistas, explicacións, comprobacións de pasos, comentarios e prompts de repaso en vez de respostas finais que non poidas explicar.

entries.source: Yes. Use Time Travel for context, History Cause and Effect for argument structure, Debate for counterarguments, and Source Critic for evidence boundaries.
entries.value: Si. Usa Time Travel para o contexto, History Cause and Effect para a estrutura do argumento, Debate para contraargumentos e Source Critic para os límites da evidencia.

entries.source: You are solely responsible for your conduct and any data, text, information, screen names, graphics, photos, profiles, audio and video clips, links ("Content") that you submit, post, and display on the inspir platform. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) uses the collected data for various purposes: To provide and maintain our Service To notify you about changes to our Service To allow you to participate in interactive features of our Service when you choose to do so to provide customer support To gather analysis or valuable information so that we can improve our Service To monitor the usage of our Service to detect, prevent and address technical issues To fulfil any other purpose for which you provide it To carry out our obligations and enforce our rights arising from any contracts entered into between you and us, including for billing and collection To provide you with notices about your account and/or subscription, including expiration and renewal notices, email-instructions, etc To provide you with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless you have opted not to receive such information In any other way we may describe when you provide the information For any other purpose with your consent
entries.value: Es o único responsable da túa conduta e de calquera dato, texto, información, nomes de pantalla, gráficos, fotos, perfís, clips de audio e vídeo, ligazóns (“Contido”) que envíes, publiques e mostres na plataforma inspir. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) usa os datos recollidos para diversos fins: proporcionar e manter o noso Servizo; notificarche cambios no noso Servizo; permitirche participar nas funcións interactivas do noso Servizo cando escollas facelo; proporcionar atención ao cliente; reunir análises ou información valiosa para que poidamos mellorar o noso Servizo; supervisar o uso do noso Servizo; detectar, previr e abordar problemas técnicos; cumprir calquera outro propósito para o que a proporciones; levar a cabo as nosas obrigas e facer valer os nosos dereitos derivados de calquera contrato celebrado entre ti e nós, incluída a facturación e cobro; proporcionarche avisos sobre a túa conta e/ou subscrición, incluídos avisos de caducidade e renovación, instrucións por correo electrónico etc.; proporcionarche noticias, ofertas especiais e información xeral sobre outros bens, servizos e eventos que ofrecemos e que son semellantes aos que xa compraches ou polos que preguntaches, salvo que optases por non recibir esa información; de calquera outra maneira que poidamos describir cando proporciones a información; para calquera outro propósito co teu consentimento

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Tamén podes comezar cunha versión aproximada do teu problema real. Un primeiro prompt desordenado está ben. A sesión pode aclarar o nivel, o público, o prazo e o estilo cando comeces.

entries.source: You can contact our Copyright Agent via email at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Podes contactar co noso Axente de dereitos de autor por correo electrónico en support@inspir.app

entries.source: You can try the format in Talk to a Historical Person. If you want the wider scene before meeting a person, use Time Travel to visit a period, inspect constraints, and then ask what choices people actually had.
entries.value: Podes probar o formato en Talk to a Historical Person. Se queres a escena máis ampla antes de coñecer unha persoa, usa Time Travel para visitar un período, inspeccionar limitacións e despois preguntar que opcións tiña realmente a xente.

entries.source: You know a Socratic AI tutor worked when the learner can do three things:
entries.value: Sabes que un titor de IA socrático funcionou cando o estudante pode facer tres cousas:

entries.source: You may provide us either directly at support@inspir.app or via third party sites and tools with information and feedback concerning errors, suggestions for improvements, ideas, problems, complaints, and other matters related to our Service (“Feedback”). You acknowledge and agree that: (i) you shall not retain, acquire or assert any intellectual property right or other right, title or interest in or to the Feedback; (ii) Company may have development ideas similar to the Feedback; (iii) Feedback does not contain confidential information or proprietary information from you or any third party; and (iv) Company is not under any obligation of confidentiality with respect to the Feedback. In the event the transfer of the ownership to the Feedback is not possible due to applicable mandatory laws, you grant Company and its affiliates an exclusive, transferable, irrevocable, free-of-charge, sub-licensable, unlimited and perpetual right to use (including copy, modify, create derivative works, publish, distribute and commercialize) Feedback in any manner and for any purpose.
entries.value: Podes proporcionarnos, directamente en support@inspir.app ou a través de sitios e ferramentas de terceiros, información e comentarios sobre erros, suxestións de melloras, ideas, problemas, queixas e outros asuntos relacionados co noso Servizo (“Comentarios”). Recoñeces e aceptas que: (i) non conservarás, adquirirás nin farás valer ningún dereito de propiedade intelectual nin outro dereito, título ou interese sobre os Comentarios; (ii) a Empresa pode ter ideas de desenvolvemento semellantes aos Comentarios; (iii) os Comentarios non conteñen información confidencial nin información propietaria túa ou de terceiros; e (iv) a Empresa non ten ningunha obriga de confidencialidade respecto dos Comentarios. No caso de que a transferencia da titularidade dos Comentarios non sexa posible debido a leis obrigatorias aplicables, concedes á Empresa e ás súas afiliadas un dereito exclusivo, transferible, irrevogable, gratuíto, sublicenciable, ilimitado e perpetuo para usar (incluíndo copiar, modificar, crear obras derivadas, publicar, distribuír e comercializar) os Comentarios de calquera maneira e para calquera propósito.

entries.source: You may submit a notification pursuant to the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA) by providing our Copyright Agent with the following information in writing (see 17 U.S.C 512(c)(3) for further detail):

entries.source: You may use Service only for lawful purposes and in accordance with Terms. You agree not to use Service:
entries.value: Podes usar o Servizo só con fins lícitos e de acordo cos Termos. Aceptas non usar o Servizo:

entries.value: Os teus dereitos de protección de datos segundo o Regulamento xeral de protección de datos (GDPR)

entries.value: Os teus dereitos de protección de datos segundo a California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)

entries.value: Os teus dereitos de protección de datos segundo a California Privacy Protection Act (CalOPPA)

entries.source: Your information, including Personal Data, may be transferred to – and maintained on – computers located outside of your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those of your jurisdiction. If you are located outside India and choose to provide information to us, please note that we transfer the data, including Personal Data, to India and process it there. Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by your submission of such information represents your agreement to that transfer. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) will take all the steps reasonably necessary to ensure that your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of your Personal Data will take place to an organisation or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of your data and other personal information.
entries.value: A túa información, incluídos os Datos persoais, pode transferirse a computadores situados fóra do teu estado, provincia, país ou outra xurisdición gobernamental, e manterse neles, onde as leis de protección de datos poden diferir das da túa xurisdición. Se estás fóra da India e escolles proporcionarnos información, ten en conta que transferimos os datos, incluídos os Datos persoais, á India e procesámolos alí. O teu consentimento a esta Política de privacidade seguido do envío desa información representa a túa aceptación desa transferencia. Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) tomará todas as medidas razoablemente necesarias para garantir que os teus datos sexan tratados de forma segura e de acordo con esta Política de privacidade, e non se realizará ningunha transferencia dos teus Datos persoais a unha organización ou país salvo que existan controis axeitados, incluída a seguridade dos teus datos e outra información persoal.
